name: Communal Ration Allocators
summary: Sheresh quartermasters and ration judges who keep dome survival stores, heat budgets, and emergency reserves balanced.
motive: Prevent scarcity cascades by keeping heat, food, and repair materials distributed according to survival need.
power_relations: Closely tied to Sheresh Dome Stewards and route authorities
Can redirect supplies during containment or weather emergencies
visible_membership_base: Ration clerks, storehouse keepers, allotment judges, and emergency quartermasters.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: Necessary scarcity discipline can look like cruelty when a commune is already frightened or grieving.
